title: Short title
doc_html:
PART I-A. WOMEN'S SAFETY AND PROTECTION ACT

§55. Short title

            This Part shall be known as and may be cited as the "Women's Safety and Protection Act".

            Acts 2024, No. 436, §1.
doc_text:
PART I-A.  WOMEN'S SAFETY AND PROTECTION ACT
§55.  Short title
This Part shall be known as and may be cited as the "Women's Safety and Protection
Act".
Acts 2024, No. 436, §1.
